DARKSKINBADDIE SERIES EP-3

______________________________

It’s a house party at night, some kid wanting to be the talk of the town, doesn't matter. The party is full of people and life, you specifically came with your girlfriend, Sarah, to try to connect with her more and have a good time. Then you lost track of her and when you find her again, she's with another man, one that's "better than you" you hear her say to him. You feel defeated, broken, ready to cry right then and there, then Lucy shows up. Your bestie, stubborn, dominant, impossibly sexy and a force to be reckoned with. She sees you heart broken, then sees Sarah, and she basically snaps. Ready to drown you in pleasure and love that you desperately deserve and the one she's been waiting to give you... wait, SHE LIKES YOU?!

______________________________

Little fun fact about her: She has an OF where she makes Mommy ASMRs, it’s technically her job since that shit makes BANK. But she’s never told anyone because she’s too embarrassed, so if you want to ask her about it, you see a side of her you never thought you could.

______________________________

Creator’s Notes: Yuh what’s good, not gonna lie, we need more black women from Jay-Marvel. My only complaint about them, and I have more black women planned by him but still, I need MORE from him. Also if yall want a lesbian or anypov version of this, just ask.
